feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to display 3 years data in Story based on User date Prompt in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

Based on User selection, i have to lookback and display 3 years data in Story. I'm able to do it by using my date InputControl, but here the Current Time Interval is static, my requirement is to take the value from user selection and then look back to 3 years.

 

 

Could someone give me a clue on, how to do this? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAC Numeric chart and linked analysis doesn't work
entry.content:
Hi,

i would like to add a "linked analysis" on a numeric chart widget.

but it doesn't work (See screenshot)

hints?

br Oliver

entry.title: SAP analytics cloud - How can i filter a story based on the logged in user department
entry.content:
Hi experts,

For my time and attendance report and i have a dimension for userId and another dimension for department name. i want to filter the story or page by the logged in userId department.

i got the logged in user in a variable called loggedInUser.

var loggedInUser = Application.getUserInfo().displayName;

Any idea how to achieve this ?

A.K

SAP Analytics Cloud, analytics designer 

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: SAC Excel Exclude Option
entry.content:
Hi 

We are trying to upload a list of Cost Centers into the SAC Excel filter function and then exclude them for the report.

IT is possible to upload the list but it is not possible to upload them and exclude them - the system will only accept the upload as Select Member only (4) . You then have to go through the long list and select "exclude" for each one. 

IN SAP AFO you can upload a list and prefix with "!" which acts as the exclude function 

We did try dimension override function in excel but the option "6" does not exist or is allowed 

 

Question 

Has anyone found a way of uploading and excluding automatically for a long list of members 

 

Thanks

 

Russell

entry.title: SAC Optimized Story - Export to Csv / Xlsx - Script Error
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working with an Optimized Story in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) where I have created a button with a script to export table data to a CSV/Xlsx file. When I attempt to export the table using the button in our current tenant, I receive the following error message:

However, when I try the exact same export in another tenant, it works without any issues. Both tenants are using import data. Does anyone know the possible reason for this discrepancy?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Unable to populate Column names dynamically for Restricted Measures in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

For my below requirement, i created 5 restricted measures on periods with range of 12*15 periods and offsets. My problem is, here i'm unable to populate the Column names, based periods restricted in measure input control. 

Here in the Restricted Measure - Calculation Editor, there is no option to create Name as Dynamic Text for Column names based on InputControl values

Could someone please help.

For Story, I'm using Classic Design Experience as Blending is supported yet in Optimized Design Experience.

entry.title: SAC Data Actions: Calculate Average from Actual & copy to Forecast
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to calculate the average of all uploaded periods in the Actual version and copy it to the remaining months of that year in the Forecast version.

For example, if I have the actual data of the first 7 periods loaded for the year 2024, the data action must calculate its average and copy it to the remaining periods of that year in the Forecast version. i-e The average of the seven months should be copied to (Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, DEC) of the Forecast version of the same year.

Would appreciate support from the gurus...

entry.title: How to Merge Dimensions Directly in SAP SAC Story?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

In SAP Web Intelligence (WEBi), we had a very useful feature that allowed us to "merge" identical dimensions at report level.

Is there a way to achieve the same functionality directly within SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) stories?

Else, how to handle such scenarios Directly in SAP SAC Story.

entry.title: Public Dimension Table Import Job Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone
Since Sunday, we have been receiving an error in our oData Import Jobs that update the Data Access Control in the Public Dimension Table as 'An unexpected error occurred while trying to update the dimension data.' Could this be related to the SAC 2024 Q4 update? Does anyone have any information?
Thank you in advance

entry.title: Blending Live and Import model
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,Can we link between live model (ECC) and import model on SAC.What are possibilities available ? What are the limitations ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Error custom widget on Story
entry.content:
Hi team. iam having this issue when loading an custom widget to my story, does anyone know how to fix it?

Best Regards,

 

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Output of one table col should be passed as input to Second table as filter in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

User will input the Compliant ID, We will get all the information related to that particular Complaint in Table1.

Table1 has columns -- Complaint information, Product Family information etc.

I need to get all the Product family values that we get in Table1 and pass as an filter to Table2 along with the other filters.

Could someone please give me a clue on how to get dimension values from Table1 and pass into Table2 filter?

In BO, it was achieved using Sub-query, i have to achieve the same in SAC now, as we are transitioning reports from BO to SAC.

entry.title: SAC - Content Usage (Open Story) per month
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I'd like to know how often a story is accessed throughout the year in every month. But I cannot find any chart/table in system overview showing it. All I get is a cumulative figure for the selected time horizon in System - Usage section.

Is there somewhere such overview? Or any guidance how to create it?

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: how to disable/hide release highlights popup in sap sac to the end users
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I unable to find an option to hide release highlights popup (as attached) which appears to the users when login (after the SAC new updates)

Is there a way that we can disable this popup to all the users as its not necessary to end users.

Regards,

Vijai Muniraj

entry.title: Dashboard Linking and Filtering Through Table Hyperlinks in SAC.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working on a project where we need to link two dashboards within SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) that both use the same BW live model. We’re attempting to use table hyperlinks to connect the dashboards, but we’re running into issues with both the Link to Story and Link to External ID options, as neither seem to work as expected.

Both dashboards utilize prompts for filtering, and we need to ensure that the selected filter values (from one dashboard) are passed correctly to the other. Has anyone encountered a similar challenge or found a solution for linking and filtering dashboards through table hyperlinks?

I’d really appreciate any insights or suggestions! 

Thank you in advance for your time and help. @William_Yu

entry.title: SAC exception aggregation type is lost after import job execution
entry.content:
Hi all

we have an SAC import model which is updated daily from BW query. Among other data which are loaded, we have some accounts which have exception aggregation type and exception aggregation dimension maintained and it  behaves in stories as expected.

The issue is that since Monday 18th Nov. after the import job runs and loads data to the model the aggregation type gets lost and the model has validation errors. Does anyone else has the same issue?

thank you

entry.title: Change a dataset in a SAC story and to keep the story structure
entry.content:
hi,

is it possible to change a dataset in a story and to keep the existing story structure:

i didnt find a way to do this...

1.) a datset with the same structure?

2) a datset with a modified structure (just to add some columns) 

br Oliver

entry.title: How to create a model in SAC joining multiple tables
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud 

Hi,

 

I am new to SAC and I am trying to create a model in SAC with multiple tables joins (not a star schema) just like in a data foundation layer in IDT universe or in Power BI.

Can someone please provide the best approach for this?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: How to generate a SAC Modell from an exsiting SAC dataset?
entry.content:
Hi,

i use a dataset in a story.

now i would like to use a ,model for this datset in this story. 

How to generate a SAC Modell from this exsiting dataset and to use this new model in the existing story, without creating a full new story? 

br Oliver

entry.title: SAC script to obtain Story Folder
entry.content:
Hi experts, here is a technical goal. 

In the SAC optimised story I would like a text box to be made visible only when the stories save folder path meets a certain criteria. 

ie

If the current Story path contains "Pathx" then Text box = visible 

It is so that we can make a clear visible distinction when people open stories saved in the 'centrally approved' folder where stories are validated and those homebrew stories that are being run from users own folders. 

I have tried to look if there is some script where I can obtain the story path, but cant find it. 

 

Any ideas?

Thanks all
